subject: Mathematics
topics: Complex Numbers: polar form, de Moivre's theorem, nth roots of unity
Argand plane: geometry of complex numbers, rotation formula
Matrices: Cayley-Hamilton theorem and inverse using adjoint
Determinants: properties and applications in system of linear equations
Continuity and Differentiability: intermediate value theorem and Rolle's theorem
Mean Value Theorem: Lagrange's and Cauchy's forms with applications
Integration: reduction formulae and integration using partial fractions
Definite Integrals: properties, Walli's formula, gamma function basics
Differential Equations: linear differential equations and Bernoulli's equation
Vectors: scalar triple product and its geometric interpretation, vector triple product
3D Geometry: angle between lines and planes, shortest distance between skew lines
Conic Sections: focal chord properties, normals to parabola ellipse and hyperbola
Probability: Bayes' theorem and total probability theorem with applications
Random Variables: mean and variance of binomial distribution
Permutations: circular permutations and permutations with repetition
Mathematical Induction: strong induction and well-ordering principle
Binomial Theorem: middle term, term independent of x, greatest term
Sequences: arithmetic-geometric progression, sum of special series
Limits: L'Hopital's rule and limits using Taylor series expansion
Applications of Derivatives: curve sketching, maxima-minima in physical problems
Area under curves: area between two curves and parametric curves
Trigonometry: inverse trigonometric identities, solution of equations in given range
